name: OPEN TEXT CORP
summary: Open Text Corporation (OTEX) is an information management company that provides enterprise software and cloud services. The company offers solutions for content management, business network, security and protection, and digital experience. OpenText serves organizations globally, helping them manage, secure, and leverage information across their operations through cloud platforms, on-premises software, and managed services.
